lines.speaker: Madison
lines.text: That angry captain. His boat got damaged and he blames my husband for not providing a weather report. The thing is, my husband's missing!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry to hear that. Maybe I could help try and find him?

lines.speaker: Madison
lines.text: Thank you for the offer, but there's already plenty of people looking for him. I'm sure they'll find him soon. I'm sure he'll be fine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sure he will be as well, and if they need more help, I'm always happy to get involved.
